name: Telco-GAIA: Bilingual Benchmark for Agents in Telecom Domain
summary: arXiv:2607.20510v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce Telco-GAIA, a bilingual, multi-modal benchmark for evaluating tool-using agents on the data of a real-world telecommunications operator....
description: arXiv:2607.20510v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce Telco-GAIA, a bilingual, multi-modal benchmark for evaluating tool-using agents on the data of a real-world telecommunications operator. Telco-GAIA comprises 100 human-verified question-answering tasks, in English and Arabic, that each demand multi-hop reasoning (4.2 hops on average) over three heterogeneous sources: a static website...
author: Dmitrii Khizbullin, Zaid Alyafeai, Abdelrahman Eldesokey, Nourah AlSultan, Raghad Alshalan, David R. Pugh, Bernard Ghanem
